# VP of Platform Engineering

## About TechCorp

TechCorp is a leading enterprise software company building next-generation identity and access management solutions.

## About the Role

We are seeking a VP of Platform Engineering to lead our platform team and drive technical strategy for our IAM platform.

## Responsibilities

- Lead a team of 20+ engineers building cloud-native IAM solutions
- Drive API strategy and developer experience initiatives
- Partner with product and security teams on platform roadmap
- Own technical architecture decisions for microservices platform
- Mentor engineering leaders and build team culture

## Requirements

- 10+ years of software engineering experience
- 5+ years in engineering leadership roles (Director, VP)
- Deep expertise in IAM, OAuth 2.0, OIDC, and SAML
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
- Strong background in API design and developer platforms
- Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, and microservices architecture
- Excellent communication and leadership skills

## Nice to Have

- Experience with identity governance (IGA)
- Background in security certifications (CISSP, etc.)
- Open source contributions
- Public speaking experience

## Compensation

$300,000 - $400,000 base + equity
